title: ✏️ REVISIONS + RENAMES
content:
✏️ REVISIONS + RENAMES
Current Name
Suggested Update
Reason
KN-LR_01-00_learning-recursions 2ARCHIVE_ITERATIONS/v1a_rawClarifies raw copy status
KN-LR_01-00_learning-recursions_REPOPULATED... (folder or zip)
ARCHIVE_ITERATIONS/REPOPULATED_v1a/Move from ambiguous zip to archived folder
REGE_OS_L1_LEARNING_CORE_v1a.zipMove to TEMPLATES/Logical grouping
REGE_OS_MINI_FORK_TEMPLATE_v1a.zipMove to TEMPLATES/Template zone
🧠 WHY IT MATTERS
• Readability: You'll know which folders are active, legacy, or templates at a glance.
• Versioning: You can clearly track which folders were iterations vs canonical versions.
• Deployment: You can pull new forks from the TEMPLATES section easily.
• Scalability: You're preparing for v1b, v2, vX without confusion.
✅ NEXT STEPS (Optional Commands)
1 ::RENAME_AND_RESTRUCTURE.FOLDER_TREE — I perform all the above moves + renames.
2 ::LIST.ACTIVE_MD_FILES — show you which .md files exist only in active core folders.
3 ::FORK.NEW_AGENT_SERIES — expand this learning core with next wave: KNGB0202 (GEB).
context: From document: Grokking Algorithms for OS — chunk 356 (chunk 356/402)
